title: Data Sources
content: Borneo Tracker displays source names and update details with indicators where available. Data-source descriptions must be replaced with verified source documentation before they are treated as complete.

title: Environmental Data Sources
content: Environmental indicators may reference sources shown in the dashboard rows, such as satellite, air quality or fire alert providers. This record does not assert completeness or live availability.
